# Shipkit

> Open product foundation kit for vibe coding — idea to shipped web product.

## Start here

- [VISION](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/VISION.md): why Shipkit exists
- [AGENTS](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/AGENTS.md): rules for coding agents
- [IDEA](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/IDEA.md): current product brief (edit per project)
- [Vibe guide](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/docs/VIBE.md): human+agent workflow
- [Architecture](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/ARCHITECTURE.md): packages and ports
- [Standards](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/STANDARDS.md): 12-factor, ASVS, agents.md
- [Decisions](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/DECISIONS.md): locked product choices
- [Production checklist](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md)

## Presets

- [supabase-full](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/presets/supabase-full.md)
- [portable-pg](https://github.com/Thunderkill016/shipkit/blob/main/presets/portable-pg.md)

## Code map

- apps/web — Next.js UI adapter
- packages/config — env + presets
- packages/security — headers, rate limit, validation
- packages/db — schema + SQL
- packages/auth — AuthPort
